name: Lure of Light
descriptionTemplate: {Slay-Gaunt} {Fixed DMG} +10%, {Relentless Hunt} Base {STR▼} effect +5%. For every 1% Crit. DMG provided by Pontos and his equipped WoD & Covenant, the {Fixed DMG} of {Slay-Gaunt} additionally +0.2%, and the Base {STR▼} effect of {Relentless Hunt} additionally +0.1%.
